assertion_results.text: JQL queries use the project key (TC) and vulnerability issue type ID (10024) from the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md — not hardcoded values (§1.49)
assertion_results.evidence: All three JQL queries in discovery-listing.md use 'project = TC' and 'issuetype = 10024'. These match the Security Configuration in claude-md-security-config.md which specifies 'Project key: TC' (from Jira Configuration) and 'Vulnerability issue type ID: 10024' (from Security Configuration). The document header also explicitly states 'Project: TC' and 'Vulnerability Issue Type ID: 10024'. Queries: (1) 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged)', (2) 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New', (3) 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA')'.

assertion_results.text: Three separate queries are constructed: one for untriaged issues (labels NOT IN ai-cve-triaged), one for triaged-but-new issues (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status = New), and one for Ready for QA candidates (labels IN ai-cve-triaged AND status NOT IN Closed, Verified, ON_QA) (§1.48)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md contains three clearly separated JQL queries: (1) Section '1. Untriaged Issues' with JQL 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels NOT IN (ai-cve-triaged) ORDER BY status ASC, created DESC'; (2) Section '2. Triaged but still New' with JQL 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status = New ORDER BY created DESC'; (3) Section '3. Ready for QA' with JQL 'project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC'. All three match the expected query patterns.

assertion_results.text: Results are grouped into three clearly separated lists: Untriaged issues, Triaged but still New issues, and Ready for QA issues
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md has three distinct sections separated by horizontal rules: '## 1. Untriaged Issues' (lines 8-29), '## 2. Triaged but still New' (lines 33-47), and '## 3. Ready for QA' (lines 51-78). Each section has its own results table. The grouping is clear and unambiguous.

assertion_results.text: Each listed issue shows: issue key, status, CVE ID (from labels), summary, and created date
assertion_results.evidence: All issue tables in discovery-listing.md include columns for Key, Status, CVE ID, Summary, and Created. For example, in the Untriaged section: 'TC-9003 | In Progress | CVE-2026-40455 | tokio - Race condition in task cancellation [rhtpa-2.2] | 2026-06-05'. The Ready for QA table also includes these fields: 'TC-9020 | Modified | CVE-2026-38901 | hyper - HTTP request smuggling [rhtpa-2.2] | 2026-05-15'. The Triaged-but-New section shows: 'TC-9010 | New | CVE-2026-39874 | quinn-proto - Panic on malformed QUIC frame [rhtpa-2.2] | 2026-05-28'. All five required fields are present for every listed issue.

assertion_results.text: Status-aware handling: New issues (TC-9001, TC-9002, TC-9004) are presented for full triage, while the In Progress issue (TC-9003) triggers a warning about active work
assertion_results.evidence: In status-handling.md: TC-9001 (line 11): 'Status: New, Handling: Proceed with full triage (default path)'; TC-9002 (line 15): 'Status: New, Handling: Proceed with full triage (default path)'; TC-9004 (line 25): 'Status: New, Handling: Proceed with full triage (default path)'. For TC-9003 (lines 18-22): 'Status: In Progress, Handling: WARNING -- This issue is already in In Progress. It may be actively worked on.' The summary table also confirms: TC-9003 has 'Warning: active work -- engineer must confirm before proceeding'.

assertion_results.text: Ready for QA filtering: TC-9020 appears in Ready for QA (all linked Tasks Done/Closed), TC-9023 is excluded (TC-9025 still In Progress), TC-9026 is excluded (no Depend links)
assertion_results.evidence: In discovery-listing.md: TC-9020 is listed under 'Ready for QA (1 issue)' with 'Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)'. TC-9023 is under 'Excluded (2 issues)' with 'Reason: Remediation in progress -- TC-9025 still In Progress'. TC-9026 is under 'Excluded' with 'Reason: No linked remediation Tasks (no "Depend" links)'. status-handling.md corroborates: TC-9020 'Ready for QA. All linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021: Done, TC-9022: Closed)'; TC-9023 'Excluded from Ready for QA. Remediation is still in progress -- linked Task TC-9025 is still In Progress'; TC-9026 'Excluded from Ready for QA. No linked Tasks with link type "Depend" were found.'
